scripts.check: npm run lint && npm run typecheck
scripts.check:full: npm run check && npm run test:routes && npm run smoke:local
scripts.smoke: dotenv -e .env.playwright -- sh -c 'if [ "$PLAYWRIGHT_BASE_URL" = "http://localhost:3000" ]; then unset PLAYWRIGHT_BASE_URL; fi; exec playwright test'
scripts.smoke:headed: dotenv -e .env.playwright -- sh -c 'if [ "$PLAYWRIGHT_BASE_URL" = "http://localhost:3000" ]; then unset PLAYWRIGHT_BASE_URL; fi; exec playwright test --project=chromium --headed'
scripts.smoke:ui: dotenv -e .env.playwright -- sh -c 'if [ "$PLAYWRIGHT_BASE_URL" = "http://localhost:3000" ]; then unset PLAYWRIGHT_BASE_URL; fi; exec playwright test --ui'
